vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: Adjusting chrony.conf to use only 'server' directives is a standard STIG remediation that does not affect authentication, boot process, or critical services. It only changes NTP source definitions, posing minimal risk of lockout or system failure.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: Potential loss of time synchronization if misconfigured; Incorrect NTP source syntax could prevent chronyd from starting
